title: iconkit configuration
description: Configuration file for iconkit icon generation CLI (iconkit.json)

input.description: Path to the input image file (.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp, .svg) or a directory of images

sizes.description: Output sizes in pixels (square). Ignored when 'preset' is set.

radius.description: Corner radius in pixels. Without sizes/preset, keeps the original image dimensions.

radius-percent.description: Corner radius as a percentage of the minimum dimension (0–50). Mutually exclusive with 'radius'.

pad.description: Padding ratio around the icon (0.0–0.5 exclusive, e.g. 0.1 = 10%).

bg.description: Background fill color as a hex string. Fills transparent areas.

ico.description: Also generate a multi-size favicon.ico alongside PNG outputs.

resize-mode.description: How to resize non-square inputs: stretch (default, may distort), fit (letterbox with bg color), cover (crop center).

html.description: Generate icons.html with <link> tags for all output icons.

manifest.description: Generate manifest.json (Web App Manifest) for all output icons.

maskable.description: Apply 18% padding for Android maskable icons (sets pad to 0.18 if not already larger).

dry-run.description: Preview output without writing any files.

quiet.description: Suppress per-file output; only print the final summary.

verbose.description: Print per-file processing details including source/target dimensions and timing.

continue-on-error.description: In batch mode, continue processing when individual files fail.

concurrency.description: Number of parallel workers for batch processing. Defaults to the number of logical CPUs.

webp-quality.description: WebP output quality (0–100). Only used when format is 'webp'.
